activities.title: International AI Ethics Conference
activities.desc: Presented a paper on responsible AI frameworks in higher education. Attended 12 parallel sessions covering bias, transparency, and governance.
activities.outcome: Published conference paper; established 3 new industry contacts for future collaboration.

activities.title: Advanced Python for Data Analysis Workshop
activities.desc: Full-day intensive workshop covering pandas, numpy, and matplotlib for data science applications.
activities.outcome: Updated course materials with new Python examples.

activities.title: Industry Guest Lecture — Siemens Smart Manufacturing
activities.desc: Organised and hosted a guest lecture by Dr Amanda Patel on Industry 4.0 and smart manufacturing for final-year students.
activities.outcome: 80 students attended; guest agreed to return for mentoring session.

activities.title: Community STEM Outreach — Balcatta High School
activities.desc: Ran a half-day STEM workshop for Year 10 students introducing robotics and engineering problem-solving.
activities.outcome: 15 students registered interest in university open day.

activities.title: IoT Security Research Seminar
activities.desc: Attended seminar on emerging threats in IoT security, covering firmware vulnerabilities and zero-trust architecture.
activities.outcome: Identified research gap for grant application.

activities.title: Scitech Science Festival Volunteering
activities.desc: Volunteered at the annual science festival running interactive engineering exhibits for school-aged children and families.
activities.outcome: Engaged ~200 visitors; promoted university engineering programs.
